arts.ttl: Real Madrid XI vs Arsenal – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid make the trip to England to take on Arsenal in the Champions League quarter-finals tonight. The holders head to North London aiming to secure a positive first-leg result. Carlo Ancelotti’s side are aiming to defend the trophy and reach the semi-finals for the fifth straight season. Los Blancos remain in the hunt for […] The post Real Madrid XI vs Arsenal – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti’s major selection dilemma ahead of Real Madrid’s UCL opener against Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti must decide where to field Federico Valverde at the Emirates Stadium today, as the tournament holders take on Arsenal in the first leg of the Champions League quarter-finals. It is thought likelier that the Uruguayan will play in Madrid’s midfield in North London - with Lucas Vázquez given the nod on the right of defense - but Ancelotti said yesterday that he was still to reach a final decision .

arts.ttl: “They f****d that one up” – Man Utd legend says he urged them to sign Arsenal star
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Rio Ferdinand has slammed his former club for failing to take his advice to make a move for Declan Rice before he joined Arsenal. The Gunners spent big money to bring Rice from West Ham to the Emirates Stadium in the summer of 2023, and he’s proven a huge success for Mikel […] The post “They f****d that one up” – Man Utd legend says he urged them to sign Arsenal star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Williams fires clear message as Arsenal target Leao as transfer alternative
arts.sum: With all of that being said, football.london has taken a look at the latest Arsenal transfer news and rumours. Links to Rafael Leao of AC Milan as a potential alternative have emerged with it possible the Italian giants look to cash in after a disappointing 2025/26 campaign.

arts.ttl: Why Odegaard fell short at Real & thrived at Arsenal
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard arrived at Real Madrid as the wonderkid everyone wanted, but he left more than five years later having made just 11 appearances.

arts.ttl: Ex-Real Madrid star reveals what Arsenal must overcome that meant Chelsea and PSG failed

arts.ttl: Revealed: Opta Supercomputer predicts new favourites to win the Champions League ahead of crunch quarter finals including huge Arsenal clash with Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arne Slot's side had been on course for a Treble not so long ago, only to lose the Carabao Cup final to Newcastle and suffer a penalty shootout defeat by Paris Saint-Germain in the round of 16.

arts.sum: Manchester United are planning for the summer and will look to pursue Ipswich frontman Liam Delap whilst Bukayo Saka has made it clear he has no desire to leave Arsenal
